emptyState.title: What do you want to do?
emptyState.body: This is the 3iQ design-system workspace. Pick a starting point or just type below.

starters.title: Review the 3iQ brand
starters.description: Get a quick tour of palette, typography, gradients, and voice.
starters.prompt: Walk me through the 3iQ brand basics — palette, typography, hero gradients, and voice rules. Use the 3iq-brand skill.

starters.title: Scaffold a brand-correct component
starters.description: Generate an HTML/CSS component using real 3iQ tokens and fonts.
starters.prompt: Help me scaffold a brand-correct component (pick one: four-part block, card, pill button, or KPI tile) using tokens and fonts from the 3iq-brand skill.

starters.title: Check copy against brand voice
starters.description: Paste marketing copy and get a voice-and-casing rewrite.
starters.prompt: I'll paste some copy. Rewrite it in 3iQ institutional voice — lead with the fact, number + unit, sentence case, no hype, no emojis. Use the 3iq-brand skill for the rules.

messages.text:
Welcome to the 3iQ design-system workspace.

This is where the system itself lives — tokens, components, brand docs, and the engineering behind them. Marketing deliverables (decks, one-pagers, fund fact sheets) usually live in a sibling marketing workspace that consumes these tokens.

The 3iq-brand skill is the authority for anything that needs to look or sound like 3iQ — palette, typography, gradients, voice. It's already installed globally and will trigger automatically when relevant.

What do you want to work on?

Happy to walk through the 3iQ brand — palette, typography, the three hero gradients (Forge / Growth / Warmth), and the voice rules that keep copy institutional. Want the full tour, or should I focus on one of those?
Give me the full tour, then show me a four-part block as a worked example.
